tools.description: Search the web and return ranked results with feedback-driven scoring.

tools.description: Find the best tool for your task across MCP servers and OpenClaw skills.

tools.name: text_to_audio
tools.description: Convert text to speech with voice selection, speed, pitch, emotion control. Outputs audio file.

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available system and cloned voices.

tools.name: voice_clone
tools.description: Clone a voice from provided audio file. Charged upon first use.

tools.name: play_audio
tools.description: Play an audio file (WAV/MP3) on the local system.

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate video from text prompt or first-frame image. Supports camera direction instructions.

tools.name: query_video_generation
tools.description: Check status of async video generation task and retrieve result.

tools.name: text_to_image
tools.description: Generate images from text prompt with aspect ratio and count control.

tools.name: music_generation
tools.description: Generate music from prompt and lyrics with style/mood control. Up to 1 minute.

tools.name: voice_design
tools.description: Design custom voice from text description with preview audio.

tools.name: geox_data_ingest_bundle
tools.description: Lazy ingestion for LAS, CSV, Parquet, SEG-Y, and structural payloads. Also supports direct base64 upload and batch mode. Replaces: geox_data_ingest_bundle + geox_task_ingest_las_batch.

tools.name: geox_data_qc_bundle
tools.description: Real QC: depth monotonicity, null %, physical range checks. Fails closed: artifact_ref must have been previously ingested.

tools.name: geox_dst_ingest_test
tools.description: Structured DST (Drill-Stem Test) ingestion with derived metrics and flags. F2 Truth: all outputs OBSERVED.

tools.name: geox_las_inspect
tools.description: Inspects LAS metadata and curve headers against GEOX Earth schemas before ingestion.

tools.name: geox_seismic_inspect
tools.description: Inspects Seismic metadata against GEOX Earth schemas before ingestion.

tools.name: geox_deviation_survey_inspect
tools.description: Inspects deviation survey metadata against GEOX Earth schemas before ingestion. Enforces: depth unit, datum, MD increasing, TVD consistency.

tools.name: geox_tops_inspect
tools.description: Inspects well tops table metadata against GEOX Earth schemas before ingestion. Enforces: unit/datum consistency, positive thickness.

tools.name: geox_seismic_segy_inspect
tools.description: Inspects SEG-Y file binary header metadata before ingestion. Inspect before ingest. Validate structure without mutating data.

tools.name: geox_subsurface_generate_candidates
tools.description: Generates ensemble subsurface outputs with residuals and data-density maps. Target classes: petrophysics, structure, flattening, vsh, porosity, saturation, netpay, permeability.

tools.name: geox_subsurface_verify_integrity
tools.description: Enforces Physics9 boundary limits and detects structural paradoxes. Never returns SEAL without verified evidence.

tools.name: geox_seismic_compute
tools.description: Unified seismic physics engine. Modes: synthetic, well_tie, time_depth_anchor, anomalous_contrast, attribute.

tools.name: geox_sequence_interpret
tools.description: Unified sequence stratigraphy engine. Workflows: single_well, project, preview, section_correlation.

tools.name: geox_evidence_reason
tools.description: Unified evidence synthesis, abduction, and contradiction engine. Phases: synthesize, abduct, contradict, full.

tools.name: geox_prospect_evaluate
tools.description: Integrated prospect evaluation (Volumetrics, POS, EVOI) with optional preview/seal. Replaces: geox_prospect_evaluate + geox_prospect_judge_preview + geox_prospect_judge_seal.

tools.name: geox_map_context_scene
tools.description: Spatial bbox context, CRS checks, and causal scene rendering. Modes: bbox_context, crs_check, render_scene, scene_summary.

tools.name: geox_system_registry_status
tools.description: Discovery of canonical tools, health, and contract epoch. Reports the ACTUAL live MCP surface with no phantom aliases.

tools.name: geox_coord_transform_tool
tools.description: Transform 3D points between block, survey, and world coordinate spaces using 4x4 affine matrices.

tools.name: geox_blockspace_resolution_tool
tools.description: Compute inline, crossline, and vertical resolution from block/survey definitions.

tools.name: geox_volume_get_frame_tool
tools.description: Extract a single 2D frame from a 3D seismic volume. Returns canonical Image2d schema.

tools.name: geox_volume_set_frame_tool
tools.description: Write a 2D frame into a 3D seismic volume. REQUIRES_888_HOLD: irreversible file mutation enforced by MCP layer.

tools.name: geox_seismic_compute_attribute_tool
tools.description: Compute a registered seismic attribute on a volume or frame. Supported: Amplitude, Variance, Sweetness, Coherence, Envelope, Frequency Average.

tools.name: geox_fault_stick_ingest_tool
tools.description: Ingest fault sticks from CSV or GeoJSON into canonical FaultSet3d schema.

tools.name: geox_attribute_registry_list_tool
tools.description: List all registered seismic attributes with metadata.

tools.name: geox_blend_volume_alpha_tool
tools.description: Alpha blend 2 or 3 seismic volumes with weighted opacities. Pure geoscience compute — no file I/O.

tools.name: geox_blend_volume_rgb_tool
tools.description: RGB blend three seismic volumes into a single color-mapped volume. Widely used for frequency decomposition interpretation.

tools.name: geox_segy_export_tool
tools.description: Export a seismic volume to SEG-Y format. REQUIRES_888_HOLD: irreversible file creation enforced by MCP layer.

tools.name: geox_claim_create
tools.description: Create a structured Earth interpretation claim with full provenance chain. Truth classes: FACT, INTERPRETATION, SPECULATION.

tools.name: geox_claim_challenge
tools.description: Challenge an existing interpretation claim with an alternative. Core tool for Multi-Discipline Self-Argument requirement.

tools.name: geox_evidence_attach
tools.description: Attach an evidence artifact to an existing claim. Types: supporting, contradicting, contextual, alternative.

tools.name: geox_claim_seal
tools.description: Submit a validated claim to arifOS for Vault999 sealing. Routes to arifOS kernel for constitutional checks.
